dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes accepting unfavorable periods to capture infrequent trends. Entry uses minimal confirmation (single MA crossover). No lookback profitability check enforced (lookback_trades_for_profitability_check=0). Exit on trend reversal (MA crossover) or 30% drawdown. Position holding multiplier suggests no strict max days. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal applies to both long and short trend-following entries.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes accepting unfavorable periods to capture infrequent trends. Entry uses minimal confirmation (single MA crossover). No lookback profitability check enforced (lookback_trades_for_profitability_check=0). Exit on trend reversal (MA crossover) or 30% drawdown. Position holding multiplier suggests no strict max days. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal applies to both long and short trend-following entries.

source_rule_text: A trend follower must accept trading through unfavorable market periods to avoid missing major trends, because trends occur infrequently (15-25% of the time) and the cost of sitting out is missing the profitable moves.
